name: gpt-architecture-synthesis
high_value_claims: Architecture itself is the agentic primitive under investigation
The missing layer above FlowMind and Poly is a classifier plus ontology plus patch algebra
Universal primitives include unit, boundary, message, state, transition, effect, constraint, proof
Meta-structures include core-boundary-adapter, declaration-lowering-IR-runtime, control-execution-state-causality, append-only proof chain, projection layer, admission boundary, patch algebra
ArchitectureIR is proposed as a normalization layer for software architecture itself
Refactor and extension can be modeled as explicit patch operators
The agentic internet kernel should stay tiny and boring while overlays remain separate

supports: patch planning as first-class architectural operation
does_not_override: logger and LevEvent spine as orthogonal families
